steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for a sentence that specifies Avery Johnson's contribution to India Arie's music. The notes state he 'played bass on the album.' The correct choice must name that specific role.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: does not mention Avery Johnson at all. ✗
  • Choice B: mentions Johnson but does not specify what he contributed. ✗
  • Choice C: does not mention Avery Johnson at all. ✗
  • Choice D: states directly that Johnson played bass on India Arie's 2001 album — the exact contribution named in the notes. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
